% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE salary IN (FROM employees | STATS m = max(salary) by languages | KEEP m)
| KEEP emp_no, salary, languages
| SORT emp_no
```

| emp_no:integer | salary:integer | languages:integer |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 10007 | 74572 | 4 |
| 10019 | 73717 | 1 |
| 10029 | 74999 | null |
| 10045 | 74970 | 3 |
| 10094 | 66817 | 5 |
| 10099 | 73578 | 2 |
